calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-07-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Geoffrey Adams for Lynette Jett.

Mr. Adams stated that he researched Louisiana law which indicates that the State Registrar would transfer birth records over 100 years old to the Secretary of the State, that they tried to obtain information by personal contact but that they did not know names of the relatives on Willie Mae's side and that they could take an ad in the newspaper to see if they could find any Heirs. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
